subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-05-10
subcodes.first_line: Consider the power of the Covenant! Where is Acca and where is Los Angeles! Yet the power of the Covenant of Bahá'u'lláh has united these two distant points!... In order to preserve the unity of the Cause and to spread the religion of God, Baha'o'llah has established this Covenant and Testament
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @East and West; communication between East and West, @growth of the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
